MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Noelle T. Nguyen, Esq., of Santan & Hart, Tel. 415.777.1308 x236, appearing for Defendant and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS ZIPCAR INCORPORATED, LIBERTY MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY and DENNIS ISNER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with fifteen days leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
